description: This video explains the significance of using a private key to sign messages, emphasizing its role as a mathematical identity and the importance of keeping it secure.
topic_summary: Understanding the function of a private key in message signing and the risks of sharing it. [t=0:08] The private key is likened to a password. [t=6:56] Signing a message with it certifies non-authorization of actions. [t=11:44] Sharing the private key can lead to unauthorized access. [t=13:52]
